channel.title: NV on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in NV on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Lyon County Sheriff’s Office (NV)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Lyon County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: JEM Signed: June 3, 2025 County: Lyon County State: NV FIPS: 32019

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: 287(g) WSO: Douglas County Sheriff’s Office (NV)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Douglas County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: WSO Signed: February 19, 2025 County: Douglas County State: NV FIPS: 32005

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: 287(g) WSO: Las Vegas Metropolitan Police Department (NV)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Las Vegas Metropolitan Police Department.

Model: WSO Signed: June 16, 2025 County: Clark County State: NV FIPS: 32003

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: 287(g) WSO: Mineral County Sheriff’s Office (NV)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Mineral County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: WSO Signed: March 10, 2025 County: Mineral County State: NV FIPS: 32021

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: Nye County Sheriff-Pahrump — Nye, NV
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Nye County Sheriff-Pahrump in Nye County, NV.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)
